temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) In a dark, outdoor setting at night, a large, muscular figure with a menacing expression is shown in a close-up. His face is covered in dirt and grime, and he has a thick, braided beard. He is bound by thick ropes and vines, and his mouth is open in a snarl as he struggles against his restraints. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a character in a state of distress and conflict, immediately creating a sense of danger and mystery about his situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous rumble and the sound of straining ropes.)
(00:02-00:05) The scene cuts to a wide, high-angle shot of a massive army marching through a dark, foggy courtyard at night. The soldiers, dressed in white and holding flaming torches, move in a long, organized line. The courtyard is surrounded by a large, Gothic-style building with arched windows. (Storyline: This shot establishes the scale of the conflict, revealing that the character from the previous scene is part of a massive, organized military force.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of hundreds of marching feet, the crackling of torches, and a low, tense musical score.)
